name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.24.8: PLATFORM_DISPATCH auto-detects agent dispatch mechanism (Agent vs spawn_agent vs inline) at REFRESH so Codex subagent dispatch works without manual tool-name translation; codex-tools.md troubleshooting section added. v1.24.7: simplify-worker reads and follows simplify:simplify as source of truth, with structural release-tooling checks for the review-gate contract. v1.24.6: required simplify:simplify review gate prefers the simplify-worker subagent adapter with inline fallback only when worker dispatch is unavailable. v1.24.5: portable config cleanup, doctor-worker spawn fallback, and skill-relative Codex reference packaging. v1.24.4: portable SkillWiki vault auto-resolution via `vault: auto`, `skillwiki path` precedence, validated `~/wiki` fallback, and explicit-path mismatch warnings. v1.24.3: fix .claude-plugin skills path (./skills/ not ./) so setup-dev-loop/investigate/research show as user-invocable in CLI. v1.24.2: all-active-plugin version sync and companion skill schema coverage. v1.24.1: simple CI/main-first setup contract. v1.24.0: preflight prep mode inventories active work, batches human readiness questions, writes automation-ready metadata, and never starts /goal. v1.23.1: fixes Codex manifest version bumping, dependencies.yaml cache sync, and doctor-worker dependency probes for plugin-root skills/frontmatter-named agents. v1.23.0: Codex CLI/App compatibility — references/codex-tools.md maps worker Agent spawns to spawn_agent/wait_agent/close_agent, documents the multi_agent config gate, and the detached-HEAD Codex App sandbox-finishing contract for MERGE/PUSH/SAVE; this .codex-plugin manifest is now part of the version-bump set (resolves prior 1.22.1 drift). v1.22.2: schema-adaptive investigate/deep-research queue contracts (proposed work items only when validation supports them, else raw transcript captures). v1.22.0: /goal compatible mode (ORCHESTRATION_CAPS goal-context detection, grill-me -> /goal -> dev-loop). v1.21.0: investigate mode. v1.15.0+: pluggable multi-backend code review, MERGE CI gate, vault auto-commit, peer-aware vault push.
